steps.title: Cancel the price advantage
steps.content: The contrast after "but" says imported goods may reduce expenses for average consumers, while high transport costs may remove that advantage for consumers far from ports. The blank needs a verb meaning make ineffective or eliminate.

steps.title: Reject speech and judgment words
steps.content: Choice A means criticize unfairly, Choice B means misinterpret, and Choice C means judge something as less important than it is. None describes transport costs eliminating a benefit. The remaining verb means to make something have no effect. The answer is D.
